issues.name: test-webhook-subscription-lifecycle
steps: Seed products and prices with matching CCBill/NMI IDs
Send NewSaleSuccess webhook with test user ID
Assert subscription created in database with correct status
Send Cancellation webhook
Assert subscription status updated to cancelled

issues.name: test-subscribe-endpoint
issues.description: Test Subscribe endpoint processes new subscriptions
steps: Seed products and prices
Test POST /v1/subscriptions/process/nmi with valid payment data
Mock NMI client response
Verify subscription created in database
Verify payment record created
Verify entitlements granted

issues.name: test-cancel-subscription
steps: Seed products, prices, and create active test subscription
Call POST /v1/subscriptions/cancel with valid auth token
Assert response indicates success
Query database to verify subscription status changed to cancelled
Call GET /v1/subscriptions/active to verify no active subscription

issues.name: test-access-status
steps: Test user with no subscription returns no access
Create subscription with premium entitlement
Test GET /v1/access returns correct entitlements
Test expired subscription returns no access

issues.name: test-dunning-attempt-worker
steps: Create past_due subscription with valid payment method
Mock NMI client to return success/failure responses
Run DunningAttemptWorker
Verify subscription renewed on success, or failed on decline
Verify payment record created on successful rebill

issues.name: test-dunning-sweep-worker
steps: Create multiple past_due subscriptions with next_retry_at in past
Run DunningSweepWorker
Verify DunningAttemptArgs jobs enqueued for each due subscription
Verify subscriptions not yet due are not enqueued

issues.name: test-payment-methods-crud
steps: Test POST /v1/payment-methods creates new payment method
Test GET /v1/payment-methods lists user's payment methods
Test PUT /v1/payment-methods/:id updates payment method
Test PUT /v1/payment-methods/:id/activate sets as default
Test DELETE /v1/payment-methods/:id removes payment method

issues.name: test-notifications-crud
steps: Seed test notifications for user
Test GET /v1/notifications returns user's notifications
Test GET /v1/notifications/unread-count returns correct count
Test POST /v1/notifications/:id/read marks notification as read
Verify unread count decrements after marking read

issues.name: test-admin-subscription-mgmt
steps: Seed subscription for test user
Test GET /v1/subscriptions/:id/details returns subscription
Test PUT /v1/subscriptions/:id/extend extends subscription period
Test POST /v1/subscriptions/:id/cancel cancels subscription
Verify database reflects admin changes

issues.name: test-admin-metrics
steps: Seed multiple subscriptions with various statuses/dates
Test GET /v1/subscriptions/dashboard-metrics returns summary stats
Test GET /v1/subscriptions/daily-metrics returns daily breakdown
Test GET /v1/subscriptions/processor-metrics returns per-processor stats
Test GET /v1/users/:user_id/entitlements returns user entitlements

issues.name: test-ccbill-flexform
steps: Seed products and prices with CCBill configuration
Test POST /v1/subscriptions/ccbill/flexform-url
Verify URL contains correct parameters
Verify user ID encoded in URL

issues.name: test-solana-wallet-linking
steps: Test POST /v1/wallet/solana/challenge generates valid challenge
Test POST /v1/wallet/solana/verify with valid signature links wallet
Test GET /v1/wallet/solana lists linked wallets
Test GET /v1/wallet/solana/linked returns primary wallet
Test DELETE /v1/wallet/solana unlinks wallet
Test duplicate wallet linking is rejected

issues.name: test-solana-payment-flow
steps: Seed products and prices with Solana payment enabled
Test GET /v1/solana/tokens returns supported tokens
Test POST /v1/solana/generate creates payment request
Test POST /v1/solana/qr generates QR code for payment
Test GET /v1/solana/check returns pending status
Test POST /v1/solana/submit with valid tx signature
Verify subscription created after successful payment

issues.name: time-mocking
issues.description: Add time-mocking capability for testing time-dependent logic
steps: Research options: benbjohnson/clock, jonboulle/clockwork, or custom solution
Create Clock interface that wraps time.Now() and can be injected
Update services/handlers to use Clock interface instead of time.Now() directly
Add SetTime() or Advance() methods to test clock for controlling time in tests
Test subscription expiry: create sub expiring Nov 30, advance to Nov 30, verify expiry logic
Test dunning/retry logic with time advancement

issues.name: cleanup-worker
issues.description: Add cleanup worker for expired temporary data
steps: Identify all temporary tables/records that need cleanup (wallet challenges, pending payments, etc.)
Create River job for periodic cleanup (e.g., CleanupExpiredDataArgs)
Implement cleanup logic: delete expired wallet challenges, pending Solana payments, stale sessions
Add configurable retention periods for each data type
Schedule worker to run periodically (e.g., every hour or daily)
Add metrics/logging for cleanup operations
Write tests to verify expired data is cleaned up correctly

issues.name: river-workers-in-tests
issues.description: Start River workers in test suite for async job testing
steps: Initialize River client in TestContainerSuite setup
Register all worker types (WebhookProcess, DunningAttempt, DunningSweep, etc.)
Start River workers in background during test setup
Add helper to wait for job completion in tests
Test webhook processing flow end-to-end (webhook -> job -> subscription created)
Test dunning sweep enqueues dunning attempt jobs
Gracefully stop workers in test cleanup

issues.name: nmi-demo-integration
issues.description: Add NMI demo account to test suite for real API integration tests
steps: Configure testcontainer suite with NMI demo credentials (security key: 6457Thfj624V5r7WUwc5v6a68Zsd6YEm)
Add NMI config to TestContainerSuite with test_mode enabled
Create test for Subscribe endpoint with real NMI API calls
Use test card number 4111111111111111 with expiry 10/25
Test successful payment creates subscription and payment record
Test declined payment (amount < $1.00) returns appropriate error
Test dunning worker rebill with real NMI API

issues.name: stripe-like-api
issues.description: Make API more Stripe-like with top-level resources
steps: Move /v1/subscriptions/products to /v1/products (top-level resource)
Add /v1/prices endpoint to list prices (optionally filtered by product)
Change /v1/payment-methods to /v1/payment_methods (underscore convention)
Update tests to use new endpoint paths
Consider adding 'object' field to responses (e.g., 'object': 'product')

issues.name: amounts-in-cents
issues.description: Store amounts in cents (integers) instead of floats
steps: Change Price.Amount from float64 to int64 (cents)
Change Payment.Amount from float64 to int64 (cents)
Create migration to convert existing amounts (multiply by 100)
Update all services to work with cents internally
Update API responses to return amount in cents (Stripe convention)
Update API requests to accept amount in cents
Add helper functions for cents <-> dollars conversion if needed for display
Update seed data and tests to use cent amounts

issues.name: processor-jsonb-field
issues.description: Consolidate processor config on Price model into single JSONB 'processors' field
steps: Add 'processors' JSONB field to Price model (map[string]string)
Create migration to add processors column
Migrate existing nmi_plan_id/nmi_provider/ccbill_price_id data to new processors field
Update PriceService to read/write from new processors field
Update Subscribe handler to check processors map for processor availability
Update Solana payment service to check processors map for 'solana' key
Update CCBill handler to check processors map for 'ccbill' key
Update webhook handlers to lookup prices by processor key
Remove old nmi_plan_id, nmi_provider, ccbill_price_id columns
Update seed data helpers to use new processors format
Update tests to verify processor-specific price filtering

issues.name: ccbill-all-event-types
issues.description: Expand CCBill webhook replay tests to cover all event types
steps: Add tests for all 15 saved webhook event types
Test newsalesuccess, cancellation, renewalsuccess, renewalfailure
Test refund, chargeback, void, expiration
Test userreactivation, upgradesuccess, upgradefailure
Test billingdatechange, customerdataupdate, newsalefailure
Verify each event type is parsed correctly and stored in database

issues.name: sync-webhook-processing
issues.description: Process webhooks synchronously instead of async via River
steps: Remove async webhook processing (WebhookProcessArgs River job)
Process webhook payloads synchronously in the webhook handler
Store webhook event record for idempotency (deduplication by processor + transaction ID)
Update webhook_events table to track processing status inline
Remove WaitForWebhookProcessed test helpers that depend on async processing
Update tests to verify results immediately after webhook handler returns
Keep dead letter queue for failed webhook processing

issues.name: ccbill-datalink-api
issues.description: Implement CCBill DataLink API for subscription management
steps: Add CCBill DataLink config (username, password, IP whitelist requirement)
Implement DataLink client with OAuth/basic auth as required
Add cancelSubscription API call to cancel subscriptions at CCBill
Add viewSubscriptionStatus API call to verify subscription status
Update CancelUserSubscription to call CCBill DataLink when processor is ccbill
Add mock DataLink client for testing
Write integration tests for DataLink API calls

issues.name: ccbill-upgrade-url
issues.description: Add CCBill upgrade URL generation endpoint
steps: Create POST /v1/subscriptions/ccbill/upgrade-url endpoint
Accept target_price_id and validate user has active CCBill subscription
Generate CCBill upgrade FlexForm URL with user's existing subscription info
Return upgrade URL for frontend to redirect user
Document CCBill Admin setup requirements (Package ID, Package Upgrade Allowed)
Write tests for upgrade URL generation

issues.name: ccbill-upgrade-entitlements
steps: In handleUpgradeSuccess, get new product's EntitlementsSpec after ActivateWithPrice
Revoke old entitlements that aren't in the new product's spec
Grant new entitlements from the upgraded product
Use existing entitlement granting logic (from lifecycle_service or admin_subscription_service)
Write tests for entitlement updates on tier upgrade
Handle edge case: same entitlements in both tiers (extend end dates)
